Conjure Corpse  

Description

1: Summon Corpse (max level 70)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 700 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 5 Recast Time: 12
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 10000
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 20 Deletable: No
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Game Description

Summons your target's corpse to you. This spell works on characters up to level 70. Consumes a tiny jade inlaid coffin when cast.

Reagents

  • Tiny Jade Inlaid Coffin x 1

Items with this effect

  • Crypt Master`s Conjuring Stone
  • Plague Bearer's Robe
  • Robe of the Bonecaster
  • Rotting Robe
  • Spell: Conjure Corpse
  • Warlock's Robe

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Conjure Corpse
ClassLevel
NEC57
SHD57
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant
  • Comments (22)
  • Sold By (2)
  • Dropped By (24)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots (1)
Post Comment
what does it do?
QuoteReply
# Sep 21 2006 at 2:43 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595175880679
8 posts
Can anybody tell me what this spell does??
▲ Page top
??
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2005 at 3:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592272537338
9 posts
I noticed ever since DoN came out this spell isn't use as much, Other than a Xegony Raid is there any real use for this spell?
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2006 at 5:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592250376082
View User Forum
60 posts
The biggest problem is if they have multiple corpses in zone. Because corpses no longer fade away if naked or if looted, if you dont have a cleric or person to rez on hand, you can only summon 1 corpse for them. PITA!
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2008 at 6:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591863387220
83 posts
small update folks we have /decay now to get rid of bodies.
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2005 at 7:37 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591797878176
Guru
346 posts
Time consuming too, rather then having to soul bind in guild lobby, or pay the gnome in guild bank to port, necro can pull straight to you and cleric in group will rez you. Otherwise you lose XP. Money and Time! better to simply summon.
▲ Page top
RE: ??
QuoteReply
# May 02 2005 at 7:19 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593971844828
65 posts
It's only good for people who don't have DoN and so can't summon their corpse to the Guild Lobby. There's still a few. but at the same time, it's also cheaper to have a necro summon corpse with this spell (with the tiny jade inlaid coffin) than to buy the stone in the guild lobby. I know I'd use it more often when given the choice.
▲ Page top
Researchable
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2004 at 9:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591802063540
17 posts
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
Spell: Conjure Corpse (Research, 200 trivial)
Warlock's Book of Binding (1)
A Piece of Parchment (1) Storebought
A Quill (1) Storebought
Words of Misery (1) Dropped
Words of Covert (1) Dropped
Words of Constancy (1) Dropped
▲ Page top
Summon vs Conjure
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2004 at 8:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591797769059
34 posts
Am I wrong or does summon corpse require a coffin and conjure no coffin is needed? both go to lvl 65
▲ Page top
RE: Summon vs Conjure
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2004 at 9:41 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344491328
Sage
150 posts
Summon corpse uses a jaid inlaid coffin, conjur corpse uses a tiny jaid inlaid coffin which are stackable and cheaper.
▲ Page top
Summon vs Conjure
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2004 at 8:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591797769059
34 posts
Am I wrong or does summon corpse require a coffin and conjure no coffin is needed? both go to lvl 65

RE: Summon Corpse
QuoteReply
# Feb 16 2004 at 4:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783932786
71 posts
I thought Call to corpse was a self only cast, AA ability that allowed you to summon your own corpse to you without mana and with copnent.
▲ Page top
Where to get
QuoteReply
# May 28 2003 at 5:14 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591788050205
3 posts
This spell drops off of Ishva maul in the splitpaw lair. He's a lvl 45. He is located in the secret underwater passage. his actual Loc. is Approx. 730, 425. Hope this helps!!!


Pitfyre lvl 30 Necro
Maelin Starpyre
▲ Page top
RE: Where to get
QuoteReply
# May 28 2003 at 10:26 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
You're thinking of "Summon corpse" the lvl 51 SK/Lvl 39 Necro spell.
▲ Page top
say what bout who's ma?
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2003 at 4:09 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362339123
19 posts
it summons lvl 65- lower peps, sweet... lvl 65 here i come
▲ Page top
RE: say what bout who's ma?
QuoteReply
# May 28 2003 at 10:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758892776
View User Forum
123 posts
The level 39 "Summon Corpse" Also gets level 65 people. The only difference in the two spells is the component, which costs less and is stackable.
▲ Page top
RE: say what bout who's ma?
QuoteReply
# Jun 06 2003 at 4:56 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788534405
42 posts
Unless they redid summon corpse, thought it had lv cap of 60.
▲ Page top
RE: say what bout who's ma?
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2003 at 2:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763500733
View User Forum
69 posts
They've updated all spells that had level 60 as a limit, as far as I know. Summon Corpse does work on players up to level 65, just like Conjure Corpse does.
